definitions.text: Not crooked, curly, or bent; having a constant direction throughout its length. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
Perfectly horizontal or vertical; not diagonal or oblique.
Of a direction relative to the subject, precisely; as if following a direct line.
examples: The door will be straight ahead of you.

definitions.text: Directly; without pause, delay or detour.
examples: On arriving at work, he went straight to his office.

definitions.text: Something that is not crooked or bent such as a part of a road or track.
